_meta: XP/leveling tuning (PROGRESSION.md §3.7, §2). All constants are data so they port + tune without code changes. Consumed by src/systems/progression.js.

levelDiff._note: PROGRESSION.md §5: lethal gap (mob >> you) → bonus XP; matched → full; trivial (mob << you) → near-zero. diff = mobLevel - playerLevel.

attrEffects._note: Per-point bonus each attribute adds to derived COMBAT stats (PROGRESSION.md §2). strength/constitution/agility/wisdom map to the four base combat stats today; intelligence/perception/charisma/luck govern systems built later (affinity power, crafting, social, drops) and carry no base-stat bonus yet.

pointsPerLevel._note: PROGRESSION.md §2: points = base + (Tier rank above Basic). Basic 3 … Legendary 8.

credits._doc: Credit drops from defeating enemies. perKill = base * level * creditYield * variance. Tuned so a fight ≈ one Potion (50 Cr) early, scaling with depth/level.
